title: White Double Face Satin Ribbon, 1-1/2 inch x 25 Yard (38mm x 23 Meters) Solid Satin Ribbon for Gift Wrapping, Wedding Decoration, Flower Bouquet, Christmas Decor, Bows Making
features: 【White Satin Ribbon】1 roll of dusty rose double-faced satin ribbon, 38mm wide, 23 meters long. Both sides of the ribbon are equally delicate, with high density and neat edges. The ample length caters to your diverse crafting or decorating requirements, enabling you to cut it into any desired length.

【High-Density Satin Ribbon】The double-faced satin ribbon crafted from high-quality polyester, has an elegant sheen and fabulous shimmer on both sides. This ribbon features a smooth, and silk-like surface, free of any wrinkles, and no fading. It's the perfect choice for gift wrapping and various crafting projects.

【Multi-purpose Decorative Ribbon】The satin ribbon is suitable for a wide range of applications including gift wrapping, wedding decor, wedding invitations, bridal flower bouquets, handmade craft projects, table decor, photography styling, home decor, scrapbooking, baking crafts, or any decoration. It's ideal for decorating various festivals, enhancing beauty, and fostering a special atmosphere.

【Wide Occasions】Silk satin ribbon can provide a lovely complement for various occasions like Weddings, holiday celebrations, Thanksgiving, Valentine's Day, Easter, Halloween, Christmas, birthday parties, graduation ceremonies, and seasonal decorations for spring, summer, fall, and winter.
【Special Note】The color might be slightly different due to different displays and different lighting. if the product does not meet your expectations, please feel free to contact us.
description: 38mm x 23 meters Double Faced Polyester Satin Ribbon Ribbon Material: The Ribbon is Made Of 100% High-Quality Polyester and Feels Like Silk It Has A Smooth Surface, and A Fabulous Shimmer, with The Same Finish on Both Sides Well Made and Strong Toughness, Elegant with Beautiful Vibrant Colors Silk-Smooth Surface, Free of Wrinkles, and Resistant to Fading Size: Width - 38mm Wide /1.5 Inches Length - 22.86 Meters Long /25 Yards Package includes: 1 X 23 Meters Double Face Satin Ribbon Ribbon Application: -- For Gift Wrapping, Wedding Decor, Wedding Invitations, Bridal Flower Bouquets, Handmade Craft Projects, Table Decor, Photography Styling, Home Decor, Scrapbooking, Baking Crafts, or Any Decoration. For All Your Gift Wrapping and Crafting Needs, Add A Touch of Elegance By Using It.
